-fx-active.description: Whether the spacer actively grows to fill available space.

-fx-adding-item-to-history-on-commit.description: Whether to add the committed item to the search history.

-fx-adding-item-to-history-on-enter.description: Whether to add the item to the search history when Enter is pressed.

-fx-adding-item-to-history-on-focus-lost.description: Whether to add the item to the search history when the field loses focus.

-fx-always-center.description: Whether the selected item is always centered within the strip.

-fx-animate-drawer.description: Whether the drawer uses animation when opening and closing.

-fx-animate-scrolling.description: Whether scrolling in the strip view is animated.

-fx-animation-duration.description: The duration of the open/close or scroll animation.

-fx-animation-enabled.description: Whether selection change animations are enabled.

-fx-arrow-indent.description: The indentation of the popover arrow from the corner.

-fx-arrow-size.description: The size of the popover arrow.

-fx-auto-commit-on-focus-lost.description: Whether the current selection is automatically committed when focus is lost.

-fx-auto-completion-gap.description: The gap between the text field and the auto-completion popup.

-fx-auto-domain-completion-enabled.description: Whether automatic email domain completion is enabled.

-fx-auto-open-group.description: Whether notification groups are automatically expanded when new notifications arrive.

-fx-avatar-arc-size.description: The arc size used for rounding the corners of square avatars.

-fx-avatar-shape.description: The shape of the avatar display.

-fx-avatar-size.description: The size (width and height) of the avatar.

-fx-background-loading.description: Whether the SVG image is loaded in the background.

-fx-blocking-opacity.description: The opacity level of the blocking overlay.

-fx-button-display.description: The display mode and position of the combo box button.

-fx-cell-height.description: The height of each cell in the tree node view.

-fx-cell-width.description: The width of each cell in the tree node view.

-fx-clip-shape.description: The clipping shape used for the photo display.

-fx-clock-type.description: The clock format used by the time picker.

-fx-cols.description: The number of columns in the year view grid.

-fx-column-alignment.description: The horizontal alignment of nodes within a column.

-fx-content-display.description: The position of the graphic relative to the text in the chip.

-fx-corner-radius.description: The corner radius of the popover background.

-fx-disable-drag-and-drop.description: Whether drag and drop between columns is disabled.

-fx-disable-month-dropdown-button.description: Whether the month dropdown button is disabled.

-fx-disable-next-month-button.description: Whether the next month navigation button is disabled.

-fx-disable-next-year-button.description: Whether the next year navigation button is disabled.

-fx-disable-previous-month-button.description: Whether the previous month navigation button is disabled.

-fx-disable-previous-year-button.description: Whether the previous year navigation button is disabled.

-fx-disable-year-dropdown-button.description: Whether the year dropdown button is disabled.

-fx-divider-position.description: The position of the divider between the before and after content, from 0.0 to 1.0.

-fx-drawer-side-padding.description: The side padding of the drawer content area.

-fx-drawer-top-padding.description: The top padding of the drawer content area.

-fx-echo-char.description: The character used to mask the password input.

-fx-editable.description: Whether the photo can be edited (cropped, zoomed, rotated).

-fx-expand-duration.description: The duration of the expand/collapse animation for notification groups.

-fx-fade-in-out.description: Whether the overlay uses a fade-in/fade-out transition.

-fx-fade-in-out-duration.description: The duration of the fade-in and fade-out transition.

-fx-fading-size.description: The size of the fading effect at the edges.

-fx-fill-digits.description: Whether numeric fields are zero-padded to fill their width.

-fx-fill-last-page.description: Whether the last page is filled with items from the previous page to maintain consistent page size.

-fx-first-last-page-display-mode.description: How the first and last page navigation buttons are displayed.

-fx-fit-height.description: The target height for fitting the SVG image.

-fx-fit-width.description: The target width for fitting the SVG image.

-fx-format.description: The time format displayed by the time picker.

-fx-gap.description: The gap between the side node and the content node.

-fx-hgap.description: The horizontal gap between cells or tiles.

-fx-hide-popup-with-no-choice.description: Whether the popup is hidden when there are no matching choices.

-fx-hide-popup-with-single-choice.description: Whether the popup is hidden when there is only one matching choice.

-fx-highlight-fill.description: The fill color used for text selection highlighting.

-fx-highlight-stroke.description: The stroke color used for text selection highlighting.

-fx-highlight-text-fill.description: The fill color of the selected (highlighted) text.

-fx-label-type.description: The type of labels shown for duration fields (none, abbreviated, or full words).

-fx-layout-direction.description: The direction in which the tree layout expands.

-fx-layout-type.description: The layout strategy used for arranging tree nodes.

-fx-length-display-mode.description: When to display the character count indicator.

-fx-linking-fields.description: Whether input fields are linked so that overflow carries over to the next field.

-fx-loop-selection.description: Whether the selection wraps around from the last item to the first.

-fx-mark-selected-days-of-previous-or-ne.description: Whether selected days from the previous or next month are visually marked.

-fx-max-drawer-height.description: The maximum height of the drawer as a fraction of the available space.

-fx-max-page-indicators-count.description: The maximum number of page indicator buttons shown.

-fx-max-zoom.description: The maximum zoom level allowed for the photo.

-fx-message-label-strategy.description: The strategy for displaying the paging message label.

-fx-min-drawer-height.description: The minimum height of the drawer as a fraction of the available space.

-fx-min-segment-size.description: The minimum size of each segment in the bar.

-fx-month-display-mode.description: How the month label is displayed in the calendar header.

-fx-month-selection-view-enabled.description: Whether the month selection view is available for quick month navigation.

-fx-mouse-transparent.description: Whether the cell is transparent to mouse events.

-fx-node-line-gap.description: The gap between tree nodes and their connecting lines.

-fx-notification-spacing.description: The spacing between notifications in the info center.

-fx-orientation.description: The orientation of the control layout.

-fx-page-alignment.description: The horizontal alignment of the paging controls.

-fx-paging-controls-location.description: The location of the paging controls relative to the content.

-fx-preferred-drawer-width.description: The preferred width of the drawer panel.

-fx-preserve-ratio.description: Whether the aspect ratio of the SVG image is preserved when resizing.

-fx-presets-location.description: The location of the date range presets panel.

-fx-progress-arc-type.description: The arc type used to render the progress arc.

-fx-read-only.description: Whether the selection box is in read-only mode.

-fx-required.description: Whether a valid email address is required.

-fx-rollover.description: Whether time/duration fields roll over when reaching their maximum or minimum value.

-fx-round.description: Whether the search text field has rounded corners.

-fx-row-alignment.description: The vertical alignment of nodes within a row.

-fx-rows.description: The number of rows in the year view grid.

-fx-same-width-page-buttons.description: Whether all page buttons have the same width.

-fx-show-all-fade-duration.description: The duration of the fade animation when showing or hiding all notifications.

-fx-show-bottom.description: Whether the bottom area with the character count is visible.

-fx-show-cancel-and-apply-button.description: Whether the cancel and apply buttons are shown.

-fx-show-days-of-previous-or-next-month.description: Whether days from the previous and next month are displayed.

-fx-show-drawer-title.description: Whether the drawer title bar is visible.

-fx-show-header.description: Whether the filter view header is visible.

-fx-show-mail-icon.description: Whether the mail icon is shown inside the email field.

-fx-show-month.description: Whether the month label is shown in the calendar header.

-fx-show-month-arrows.description: Whether the month navigation arrows are visible.

-fx-show-page-size-selector.description: Whether the page size selector is shown.

-fx-show-paging-controls.description: Whether the paging controls are visible.

-fx-show-popup-trigger-button.description: Whether the popup trigger button is shown.

-fx-show-presets.description: Whether the date range preset options are shown.

-fx-show-previous-next-page-button.description: Whether the previous and next page buttons are shown.

-fx-show-search-icon.description: Whether the search icon is displayed in the search field.

-fx-show-today.description: Whether today's date is visually highlighted.

-fx-show-today-button.description: Whether the 'Today' button is shown for quick navigation.

-fx-show-validation-icon.description: Whether the validation status icon is shown.

-fx-show-week-numbers.description: Whether week numbers are displayed in the calendar.

-fx-show-year.description: Whether the year label is shown in the header.

-fx-side.description: The side where the side node is positioned.

-fx-size.description: The size of the loading indicator.

-fx-slide-in-duration.description: The duration of the slide-in animation for new notifications.

-fx-smooth.description: Whether smooth filtering is applied when rendering the SVG image.

-fx-step-rate-in-minutes.description: The step rate in minutes for the time picker.

-fx-style-type.description: The visual style type of the arc progress indicator.

-fx-supporting-multiple-addresses.description: Whether the field supports entering multiple email addresses.

-fx-svg-url.description: The URL of the SVG image to display.

-fx-track-arc-type.description: The arc type used to render the background track arc.

-fx-transparent.description: Whether the info center background is transparent.

-fx-use-scroll-pane.description: Whether a scroll pane wraps the paged content.

-fx-vgap.description: The vertical gap between cells or tiles.

-fx-warning-threshold.description: The threshold (0.0 to 1.0) at which the character count warning style is applied.

-fx-week-number-column-width.description: The width of the week number column.

-fx-year-display-mode.description: How the year label is displayed in the calendar header.

-fx-year-selection-view-enabled.description: Whether the year selection view is available for quick year navigation.
